title: Modeled Field Syntax Library
text: Modeled Field Syntax Library A Field Syntax Library contains Modeled Field Syntax objects that can be used during development when defining fields. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: fsylib Main Development Object? No Part of: — Contains: Property , Modeled Field Syntax Generalization: Main Development Object , Library Specializations: — Compilation Output: — URI format: fsylib:LIB Specialization The Modeled Field Syntax Library specializes Main Development Object and Typed Library in the following ways: It can only contain Modeled Field Syntaxes as child development objects. It has a fixed name of LIB . It is automatically created when the first Modeled Field Syntax is created. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
